inputs.label: Base Salary
inputs.businessContext: Monthly base salary of the employee

inputs.label: Bonus Months
inputs.businessContext: Number of months' salary as Chinese New Year bonus (typically 1)

inputs.label: Years of Service
inputs.businessContext: Total years of service for loyalty bonus calculation

inputs.label: Dependents
inputs.businessContext: Number of dependents for family allowance bonus

inputs.label: Overtime Hours
inputs.businessContext: Overtime hours worked in the bonus period

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Applicable tax rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.2 for 20%)
